title: Authentik/OIDC authentication backend
description: Add Authentik/OIDC login, logout, and session handling to the web app, with a users table for future ownership to attach to. Deliberately does not tie data ownership to identity in this phase. Local/dev installs keep working unauthenticated by default.
notes: See docs/adr/0003-authentik-oidc-authentication-backend.md. Depends only on EPIC-101 having shipped in sequence (no functional dependency). auth.enabled=false is the default and preserves current no-auth behaviour exactly. Deferred: MFA policy (owned by Authentik), SCIM provisioning, RBAC beyond authenticated/anonymous, any ownership/authorization change (EPIC-103).
